legal_description.value: A portion of the Southwest Quarter of Section 23, Township 2 South, Range 6 East, Gila and Salt River Base and Meridian, Maricopa County, Arizona; containing 40.00 acres more or less. Parent tract of SEVILLE PARCEL 3 (to be platted 2001).

source_note.value: Demo-only instrument. Models the developer acquisition that preceded the 2001-01-30 plat recording (20010093192). Shea Homes was the actual platting entity on Seville Parcel 3 — that much is documented in the plat itself. The fabricated part is the specific prior-holder sequence (Williams heirs → Seville Ventures LLC → Shea Homes). A special warranty deed on the developer-to-developer step is common in Arizona; the seller warrants only against defects arising during its own ownership.

raw_api_response.synthesized_note: Demo-only instrument reconstructing the developer-acquisition step before Shea Homes recorded the 2001 Seville Parcel 3 plat. Shea Homes as platting entity is real; the specific prior-holder LLC is fabricated. No real instrument by this recording number exists in publicapi.recorder.maricopa.gov.
